text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Why didn't you fall into the pitfall trap I
spent so much time digging?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh? A pitfall trap? Windy, did you dig a hole?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Darn right I did. But you just hopped right over it,
totally untrapped.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I went screaming after you to come back, but I
ended up falling into it myself...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Next time, just try calling out to me
while you're in the hole!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll know where it is and hop right in like a
prairie dog!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Now that's a great idea! All right, next time
you're as good as got!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Don't forget to jump in first for it to work!
